name: Workflow
description: Natural-language workflow actions (create, activate, deactivate, delete). Eliza auto-resolves WORKFLOW_HOST and WORKFLOW_API_KEY by minting a short-lived token from the Eliza Cloud workflow gateway when paired (the cloud key itself is never passed through). Explicit env/config values override.

WORKFLOW_HOST.label: Workflow Host
WORKFLOW_HOST.help: Workflow service instance URL. Leave blank — Eliza auto-resolves this via the Eliza Cloud workflow gateway when cloud is authenticated.

WORKFLOW_API_KEY.label: Workflow Api Key
WORKFLOW_API_KEY.help: Workflow service API key. Leave blank — Eliza auto-resolves this (cloud gateway token). Only set this to override the auto-resolved credential.
